series_metadata.series_title: REQUIREMENT

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Temporary Record. 1 year. ## Requirement and Recommendations Implementing Records Disposition Authority (RDA) {#requirement-and-recommendations--implementing--records-disposition-authority-rda .H2} Under Code of Alabama 1975 § 41-13-21, "no state officer or agency head shall cause any state record be destroyed or otherwise disposed of without first obtaining approval of State Records Commission." This Records Disposition Authority constitutes authorization by State Records Commission disposition of records of Agency as stipulated in this document. One condition of this authorization is that Agency submit an annual Records Disposition Authority (RDA) Implementation Report on its activities, including documentation of records destruction, State Records Commission. Unless otherwise stipulated in this document, Agency must transmit all permanent records which are no longer in active use ADAH
